title: Bach or Stravinsky (BoS) Payoff Matrix
description: A visual representation of the two-player coordination game showing the payoffs for each combination of strategies (Bach or Stravinsky). It highlights the two pure-strategy Nash Equilibria where players coordinate on the same concert.
relationships: The cell at the intersection shows the payoff for (Player 1, Player 2)
The outcomes (Bach, Bach) and (Stravinsky, Stravinsky) are Nash Equilibria
